# 🏃 FAOS Scrum Master Plugin

> Cowork Plugin | Exported 2026-03-13

## Overview

**Technical Scrum Master + Story Preparation Specialist**

Certified Scrum Master with deep technical background. Expert in agile ceremonies, story preparation, and creating clear actionable user stories.

## Commands

| Command | Description |
|---------|-------------|
| `/sm:sprint-planning` | Generate or re-generate sprint-status.yaml from epic files (Required after Epics+Stories are created) |
| `/sm:create-story` | Create Story (Required to prepare stories for development) |
| `/sm:validate-create-story` | Validate Story (Highly Recommended, use fresh context and different LLM for best results) |
| `/sm:epic-retrospective` | Facilitate team retrospective after an epic is completed (Optional) |
| `/sm:correct-course` | Execute correct-course task (When implementation is off-track) |

## Bundled Skills

| Skill | Priority |
|-------|----------|
| `context-manager` | recommended |
| `slack-bot-builder` | recommended |
| `release-notes` | recommended |

## Installation

### Claude Code (Desktop)
1. Download or clone this plugin directory
2. In Claude Desktop: Settings > Plugins > Install from folder
3. Select the `faos-sm/` directory

### Enterprise Marketplace
1. Add this plugin to your private plugin marketplace GitHub repo
2. Team members install via: Settings > Plugins > Marketplace

Exported from [FAOS Agent Framework](https://github.com/frank-luongt/Foundation-AgenticOS)
